name: Qualified Subchapter S Subsidiary (QSub) Election

eligibility.description: The parent must be an S-Corp and own 100% of the subsidiary's stock.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows an S-Corp to treat a 100% owned subsidiary as a disregarded entity for tax purposes, simplifying filings and allowing for the offset of income and losses.
